title: NoHeartShaking
description: Stop your hearts from shaking at low HP!
body:
# NoHeartShaking

> **Stop your hearts from shaking at low HP!**

A minimalistic client-side mod that disables the heart "shaking" animation when the player's health is **2 hearts or less**.
Perfect for **custom maps**, **modpacks**, or **challenge runs** like a 1-heart survival where that constant jitter becomes more annoying than helpful.

![Hearts before installing the mod](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RaydanOMGr/NoHeartShaking/refs/heads/screenshots/Before-NoHeartShake.webp)
![Hearts after installing the mod](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RaydanOMGr/NoHeartShaking/refs/heads/screenshots/After-NoHeartShake.webp)

## Why does this mod exist?

The vanilla heart shaking effect is meant to indicate low health, but in curated experiences, like challenge maps or minimal UIs it can be distracting or even immersion-breaking. This mod stops that animation completely, making it ideal for:

* Hardcore challenge modpacks
* Minimal HUD setups
* Custom maps with persistent low-health scenarios

## Requirements

* **Minecraft:** 1.21.5 (tested), may work on other versions, try it out!
* **Loader:** [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/) or [Quilt](https://quiltmc.org/)
* **Java:** 21 or newer

## Need Support?

If you have questions, ideas, or bugs to report, come hang out in the [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/3vfnvBFRKv).
